title: Creativity Test
description: Discover how your creativity manifests in everyday life.

questions.question: When facing a problem, you usually...

options.text: Look for a unique solution that hasn't been tried before
Imagine endless possibilities
Express ideas through drawings or doodles

questions.question: In your free time, you like to...

options.text: Make something out of used goods
Write stories or poems
Draw, paint, or do photography

questions.question: How do you pour out your ideas?

options.text: Directly try them out and experiment
Imagine them in detail in your mind
Make sketches or visual diagrams

questions.question: During brainstorming, you...

options.text: Propose practical but out-of-the-box ideas
Flow with wild ideas without logical limits
Help visualize ideas with doodles/drawings

questions.question: What do you do with broken items?

options.text: Try to fix them with whatever tools/methods are available
Imagine the item could be turned into another tool
Turn them into decoration or art

questions.question: When you have to give a presentation, you...

options.text: Make unique interactive props
Open with an imaginative narrative story
Design very neat and aesthetic slides

questions.question: You prefer to work...

options.text: With an experimental and trial-and-error method
With complete freedom without fixed rules
In a beautiful, fragrant, and inspiring environment

questions.question: Inspiration usually comes from...

options.text: Complex problems that need solving
Daydreams and dreams at night
The beauty of nature, museums, or art exhibitions

questions.question: You are usually admired by friends for your...

options.text: Clever solutions (Life hacks)
Imagination and wild stories
Aesthetic taste and style

questions.question: Your dream project is...

options.text: Creating an innovative and useful product
Writing a best-selling novel or movie script
Holding a solo art or design exhibition

questions.question: When a new idea suddenly appears, you...

options.text: Immediately look for logical ways to realize it
Develop it in your imagination into something very grand
Write it down or draw it so its form isn't lost

questions.question: What you value most in a work of art...

options.text: Functionality and practical usefulness
Philosophical meaning and the story behind it
Visual beauty and color harmony

questions.question: When arranging your desk, you focus on...

options.text: The layout of tools for easy access and efficiency
Sticking quotes and things that trigger memory
The color of the desk, aesthetic decorations, and lighting

questions.question: If making a gift for a friend, you will...

options.text: Assemble a DIY item that makes their life easier
Write a poem or long letter that touches their heart
Make a scrapbook or beautiful handicraft

questions.question: When planning a vacation, you like to...

options.text: Look for secret routes and budget travel hacks
Imagine an exciting adventure without a strict itinerary
Look for locations with the most beautiful scenery to photograph

questions.question: The best way for you to memorize something is...

options.text: Create a system of formulas or mnemonics
Weave it into a silly story
Draw a mind map with colorful markers

questions.question: When watching a Sci-Fi movie, you focus on...

options.text: The logic of the technology and machines shown
The alternative world and the freedom of the script
The CGI effects, costumes, and cinematography

questions.question: Trying a new route to work/campus, your reason is...

options.text: To find out if this route saves 5 minutes
To see if there's any interesting random event
To see different building or tree scenery

questions.question: If you see a pile of random Lego blocks, you will...

options.text: Build a sturdy tower or bridge structure
Make up a story about heroes in Lego city
Arrange them into a color gradient pattern

questions.question: You feel most frustrated if...

options.text: You have to follow inefficient procedures
You are restricted by rules that stifle your wild ideas
You are placed in an ugly, messy, and dull room

questions.question: When reading a cookbook, you...

options.text: Modify the measurements to optimize the taste
Imagine new flavors that have never been created before
Care more about how to arrange the plating

questions.question: If you keep a journal, its contents are mostly...

options.text: Tracking tables and graphs
Long narratives about feelings and random ideas
Doodles, stickers, and calligraphic writing

questions.question: If stranded on a deserted island, your contribution is...

options.text: Making a water filter and animal traps
Telling stories around the campfire to keep everyone's spirits up
Making shell crafts to beautify the bivouac

questions.question: When playing video games, you most enjoy...

options.text: Finding system glitches or crafting the strongest items
Exploring the fantasy world story (Lore/RPG)
Admiring the graphic details and character designs

questions.question: When asked to make a report...

options.text: Create data tables and advanced auto-formulas
Write an opening paragraph that sparks curiosity
Choose elegant font and color combinations for the report

questions.question: When listening to instrumental music without lyrics, you...

options.text: Analyze the tempo, structure, and instruments used
Automatically imagine a movie scene in your head
Associate the tone with an emotion or painting color

questions.question: Your favorite clothes are usually...

options.text: Functional, comfortable to move in, and have many pockets
Unique, eccentric, or have weird printed messages
Harmonious in color, aesthetically cut, and stylish

questions.question: If you were a film director, your main focus would be...

options.text: Special effects, camera tricks, and cinematography
The depth of the script and plot twists
Art direction, makeup, and actor costumes

questions.question: Seeing a mysterious antique item at a flea market...

options.text: Think about the mechanism of how this item works
Imagine who the original owner was 100 years ago
Admire the carvings, aged colors, and classic shape

questions.question: In team discussions, you often blurt out...

options.text: 'What if we change the flow to make it faster?'
'Imagine if we did this crazy thing!'
'What if we made the presentation prettier?'

questions.question: Giving directions to a stranger, you...

options.text: Give distance markers (meters) and directions (North/South)
Tell a story ('Later there will be a red stall, there's a cat...')
Quickly draw a small map on paper

questions.question: When your room feels boring, you...

options.text: Tidy up the cables and assemble new functional shelves
Imagine if this room were a spaceship cabin
Change the bedsheets, adjust the lighting, and put up posters

questions.question: When relaxing watching clouds in the sky...

options.text: Estimate wind pressure and potential rain
See animal or dragon shapes in the clouds
Be mesmerized by the composition of orange light on evening clouds

questions.question: Looking at the apps on your phone, the most are...

options.text: Productivity apps, measuring tools, smart home, or financial apps
Story reading apps, writing apps, or narrative games
Photo editing apps, illustration apps, or Pinterest

questions.question: The hobby you are most likely to pursue...

options.text: Coding, building PCs, or woodworking
Role-Playing (RPG), writing fiction, or debating
Painting, photography, or fashion design

questions.question: Your fastest way to learn something new is...

options.text: Taking it apart and practicing how it works directly
Making analogies and connecting it to other concepts
Watching very visual tutorial videos

questions.question: If asked to create a YouTube channel, your content would be...

options.text: Science experiments, gadget reviews, or life hacks
Discussing conspiracy theories, mystery stories, or book reviews
Aesthetic vlogs without voice (cinematic), or art tutorials

questions.question: Your creative side when cooking instant noodles...

options.text: Finding a 2-minute boiling method for perfect chewiness
Mixing in weird ingredients with unimaginable taste
Arranging vegetables, eggs, and sauce to look like a restaurant dish

questions.question: When facing a creative block, you...

options.text: Switch software or tidy up your tools
Sleep or daydream hoping for an 'Aha! moment'
Look for fresh visual references in galleries or museums

questions.question: If given a blank piece of paper when bored...

options.text: Fold it into an aerodynamic paper plane
Write a list of wild ideas or a short poem
Doodle patterns of eyes or flowers

questions.question: Your favorite childhood toy...

options.text: Building blocks, Tamiya cars, or Rubik's cube
Dolls or action figures to create war/kingdom stories
Coloring books, colored pencils, or Play-Doh

questions.question: The birthday gift you most want to receive...

options.text: The latest sophisticated multi-function gadget
A thick novel with an epic fantasy story
Premium painting tools or aesthetic wall decorations

questions.question: Your creative way of tidying the wardrobe...

options.text: Arrange them by category type and ease of access
While recalling the story behind each old shirt
Sort them by color gradient from dark to light

questions.question: At a festival, you are most interested in...

options.text: Technology, robotics, and innovation exhibition booths
Theatre performances, storytelling, or stand-up comedy
Fine art exhibitions, handicrafts, or light installations

questions.question: Commenting on a friend's new car, you discuss...

options.text: Engine capacity, smart features, and fuel efficiency
Imagining how fun this car would be for a mountain road trip
Praising the elegant paint color and body curve design

questions.question: If you were the architect of your dream house...

options.text: Build a house with Smart Home technology and solar panels
Create a secret basement behind a bookshelf
Build an open-concept house with beautiful natural light

questions.question: When buying a notebook at a store...

options.text: Look for one with grid paper and a pen loop
Look for one with a leather cover that looks mysterious like a spellbook
Look for one with the most beautiful illustrated cover

questions.question: Commenting on a city's layout...

options.text: Very annoyed if the transportation layout is illogical/congested
Like old towns that have myths and urban legends
Admire the architecture of historic buildings and the beauty of its parks

questions.question: Your social media posting style is usually...

options.text: Share articles, infographics, or life tips
Write long opinion threads or stories about daily life
Upload aesthetic photos edited with perfect tone

questions.question: In the end, creativity for you is...

options.text: The ability to hack problems to find better solutions
The mind's ability to transcend boring reality
The ability to create harmony and beauty that can be felt
